name: Chocolate Sauce
description: Rich, velvety chocolate sauce that adds a smooth, indulgent finish to every scoop.

name: Sprinkles
description: Colorful, sweet sprinkles that add a playful touch and a hint of crunch.

name: Cookie Crumble
description: Crushed cookie pieces that bring a buttery, crumbly texture and a touch of sweetness.

name: Caramel
description: Smooth, golden caramel with a deep, buttery sweetness that melts into every bite.

name: Whipped Cream
description: Light, airy whipped cream that adds a soft, creamy finish.

name: Crunchy Nuts
description: Roasted nuts that add a rich, nutty flavor and a satisfying crunch.

name: Banana Chunks
description: Fresh banana pieces that bring a naturally sweet and creamy texture.
